subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Basitatu'l-Haqiqah
subcodes.first_line: As to the question the enquirer hath asked concerning the sage’s assertion, saying: the Element of Simple Reality is all things… words without deeds are as bees that yield no honey
subcodes.first_line_orig: و ما سئل السائل فی قول الحکماء بسیط الحقیقه کل الاشیاء قل فاعلم ان المقصود
subcodes.subjects: @words vs deeds, @unity of existence [wahdatu'l-wujud], @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Greek philosophers; Greek civilization, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @uncompounded reality [basitu'l-haqiqah], @interpretation of words and passages in scripture
